brainrot_payload.source_prompt: Act as a Senior Web Accessibility Consultant specializing in 'Low-Bandwidth Retro-Computing.' I have a repository https://github.com/Turbo-the-tech-dev/brainrot that needs a Lynx-compatible index.html. Generate a version that uses zero CSS but utilizes standard HTML tags like <pre>, <b>, and <u> to simulate a high-security terminal interface. The goal is 100% readability in a text-only environment for a critical 'Out-of-Band' emergency management system. Provide the raw HTML code optimized for a cat <<EOF injection.
